'''gayongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrogeny|iatrogeny]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrogeny|iatrogeny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gayongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæyengeth|gæyengeth]] || [[word:gæyengej|gæyengej]] || [[word:gæyengesh|gæyengesh]] || [[word:gæyenge|gæyenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayoyongoth|gayoyongoth]] || [[word:gayoyongoj|gayoyongoj]] || [[word:gayoyongosh|gayoyongosh]] || [[word:gayoyongo|gayoyongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayongoth|gayongoth]] || [[word:gayongoj|gayongoj]] || [[word:gayongosh|gayongosh]] || [[word:gayongo|gayongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayofngoth|gayofngoth]] || [[word:gayofngoj|gayofngoj]] || [[word:gayofngosh|gayofngosh]] || [[word:gayofngof|gayofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gayongotho|gayongotho]] || [[word:gayongojo|gayongojo]] || [[word:gayongosho|gayongosho]] || [[word:gayongoko|gayongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gayongoth|gayongoth]] || [[word:gayongoj|gayongoj]] || [[word:gayongosh|gayongosh]] || [[word:gayongo|gayongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gayongothol|gayongothol]] || [[word:gayongojol|gayongojol]] || [[word:gayongoshol|gayongoshol]] || [[word:gayongokol|gayongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gayongothotho|gayongothotho]] || [[word:gayongojojo|gayongojojo]] || [[word:gayongoshosho|gayongoshosho]] || [[word:gayongoko|gayongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gayongothon|gayongothon]] || [[word:gayongojon|gayongojon]] || [[word:gayongoshon|gayongoshon]] || [[word:gayongokon|gayongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gayongothoro|gayongothoro]] || [[word:gayongojoro|gayongojoro]] || [[word:gayongoshoro|gayongoshoro]] || [[word:gayongokoro|gayongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
